---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

<div class="page-wrap">

<div class="hero">

# Keertana Vajjhala

<div class="subtitle">Digital IC Design Engineer · VLSI · Computer Architecture</div>

<div class="tagline">
Graduate student at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign (MEng ECE, Dec 2026), 
with 2+ years of industry experience designing and verifying ASIC silicon at Samsung Semiconductors. 
I work at the intersection of RTL design, microarchitecture, and SoC verification — 
building hardware that has to work the first time.
</div>

<div class="hero-links">
  <a href="experience.qmd">Experience →</a>
  <a href="projects.qmd">Projects →</a>
  <a href="assets/Keertana_Resume.pdf" target="_blank">Resume (PDF) →</a>
  <a href="contact.qmd">Contact →</a>
</div>

</div>

---

<p class="section-header">Background</p>

I earned my Bachelor of Technology in Electronics and Communication (specialization: VLSI) from PES University, Bangalore, graduating with an 8.58 GPA and the MRD Merit Scholarship (top of class). At Samsung, I progressed from hardware intern to Senior Engineer, shipping multiple ASIC tape-outs for datacenter, client, and automotive NVMe SSD controllers. My graduate coursework at UIUC spans Advanced Computer Architecture, VLSI Design, Applied Parallel Programming (CUDA), and Logic Synthesis.

My technical interests center on low-power digital design, SoC microarchitecture, and the verification methodologies required to build reliable silicon at scale. I am particularly drawn to constrained-domain problems — implantable devices, edge inference accelerators — where every microwatt and every gate must be justified.

---

<p class="section-header">Skills</p>

<div class="skills-group">
<div class="skills-label">HDL & Languages</div>
<span class="tag">SystemVerilog</span>
<span class="tag">Verilog</span>
<span class="tag">VHDL</span>
<span class="tag">Python</span>
<span class="tag">C / C++</span>
</div>

<div class="skills-group">
<div class="skills-label">EDA & Flows</div>
<span class="tag">Synopsys Design Compiler</span>
<span class="tag">Cadence Virtuoso</span>
<span class="tag">Xilinx Vivado</span>
<span class="tag">Synthesis</span>
<span class="tag">Place & Route</span>
<span class="tag">Timing Analysis</span>
</div>

<div class="skills-group">
<div class="skills-label">Verification</div>
<span class="tag">UVM</span>
<span class="tag">Functional Verification</span>
<span class="tag">Formal Verification</span>
<span class="tag">DFT</span>
<span class="tag">CDC</span>
<span class="tag">LDRC</span>
</div>

<div class="skills-group">
<div class="skills-label">Protocols & Interfaces</div>
<span class="tag">PCIe</span>
<span class="tag">NVMe</span>
<span class="tag">UFS 4.0</span>
<span class="tag">AXI</span>
<span class="tag">AHB</span>
</div>

</div>
